full_text:
TLS meeting

15.01.2025

Agenda

Antibody validation results
BCL6_1, BCL6_2, BCL6_3, Tcf1_1, IgG, CD20_1, CD138_3, CD138_4, HEV_1, HLA-DPB1_2, CD21_1, HLA-DR_1, CD206_1, CD3D_1, IgD, CD68_1, FAP_1, AICDA_1

TLS-IDS tCycIF staining panel discussion

Scanning parameter 
binning 1 or 2, exposure time 
Storage
Sectioning plan for all samples

Progress and timeline
validation, tCycIF staining, image-processing, and analyses
HE analyses and potential master student

iCAN Bulk RNA-seq ideas

1:100 GREEN show fewer aggregates and some potential positive signals. However there are false positive signals and also still many aggregates. Not suitable to use.
